title: ClassFeature
description: Individual class feature at a specific level

class_name.description: Name of the class that grants this feature

mechanical_effect.description: Structured representation of the mechanical impact; only fields that apply need to be present

type.description: Effect category (e.g. extra_attack, damage_bonus, resistance, movement_bonus)

value.description: Numeric value or dice notation associated with the effect

uses.description: Number of times per rest this feature can be used; 0 = unlimited
